name: Feather Sources
subtitle: Unofficial Feather sources for sideloading apps.

apps.name: Plezy
apps.subtitle: Modern cross-platform Plex client
apps.localizedDescription: A modern Plex client built with Flutter for native performance and a clean interface. Stream your media library with a beautiful, responsive UI.

versions.localizedDescription:
## Added

- Jellyfin support
- Live TV DVR and recordings
- iOS external display playback
- tvOS support

## Fixed

- ExoPlayer ASS subtitle delay
- iOS PiP subtitle issues
- Plex startup, home hub retries, and endpoint failover
- Sync rule removal/navigation
- UHD/4K media labels
- Various focus issues

## Improved

- Playback and player UI performance
- Discord Rich Presence posters

## Fixed

- Non-ASS subtitles on Android 36+ not rendering

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/edde746/plezy/compare/1.35.1...1.35.2

## Fixed

* Live TV non-cloud EPG
* Android: mpv crash

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/edde746/plezy/compare/1.35.0..1.35.1

## Added

- Transcoding
- Server grouping and hidden-library browsing
- MAL/AniList/Simkl progress sync
- Per-tracker library whitelist/blacklist
- Match/unmatch metadata
- Settings export/import
- Global fullscreen toggle (F11 + sidebar)
- "Start in fullscreen" option on Windows/Linux
- Episode next/prev hotkeys
- Toggle episode number on cards
- Toggle auto update check on startup
- ExoPlayer box-fit modes (letterbox/cover/stretch)
- ArtCNN shader presets
- Display switch delay on Android

## Fixed

- Suppress Steam Input duplicate actions on Windows

## Fixed

- ExoPlayer external subtitle attach
- ExoPlayer libass crash

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/edde746/plezy/compare/1.34.1...1.34.2
